source: RuneQuest Starter Set Book 2: The World of Glorantha (2021)

unique_aspects.title: Religion is real and practical
unique_aspects.detail: Gods act in the world through cults, worship, and magic, and religion shapes everyday life.

unique_aspects.title: Community defines identity
unique_aspects.detail: People are known through kin, cult, clan, tribe, and city rather than individualism or alignment.

unique_aspects.title: Myth is participatory
unique_aspects.detail: Heroes can enter the God Time, reenact myths, and potentially alter them through heroquesting.

unique_aspects.title: Passions and loyalties drive action
unique_aspects.detail: Concrete devotions, hates, loves, and obligations matter more than abstract moral categories.

hero_wars.summary: As Rune affinities deepen and heroes engage mythically, they become part of the looming Hero Wars, an apocalyptic struggle involving Chaos and great powers.

calendar.detail: The Gloranthan year has five seasons of eight weeks plus Sacred Time, with seven days per week.
